person.name: Doug Courter
person.tenure: Since May 2011 (14+ years at Valley Grace)
side_gigs: Adjunct IT instructor at Hagerstown Community College
Adjunct IT instructor at Blue Ridge Community College
Board President + Database Manager for Three-Strands missions org

fit_reason: Tech-literate pastor (IT instructor) = unicorn early-adopter for AI-in-ministry. Highest-confidence DFY-ready non-realtor sub on the list.
outreach_recommendation: Free pilot: 4 sermon outlines (his choice of texts) + 1 missions newsletter for Three-Strands. Frame around 'AI tools for tech-literate pastors' — meets him at his actual sophistication level. Outcome: church-vertical case study.
ai_pain_points: Sermon prep and outlines (preaches regularly per sermonaudio.com)
Missions newsletters for Three-Strands (board president responsibility)
IT class lecture prep (community college teaching)
tone_for_outreach: Tech-literate, no condescension. Recognize his IT background. Don't oversimplify.
